name: ‹⟨[|]⟩› JW ~ Camp Cretaceous ‹⟨[|]⟩›
description:
~ Cool intro ~ You are one of the Nublar Seven, consisting of Darius the Dino Nerd, Brooklynn the Internet Girl, Sammy the Texan Cowgirl, Kenji the Rich, Yasmina the Macho Girl, and Ben which we call Barfy, who were invited to the unique and brand new experience in one of the most incredible places of the whole world, JURASSIC WORLD, and invited to be part of the new Camp Cretaceous. Nothing can go wrong in this adventure... right?

Main Characters(Other than you ofc):

1• Darius Bowman 🦖

The Dino-Nerd who knew almost everything about dinosaurs and is also excited about them!

2• Brooklynn📱

A daring pink-haired girl who's also a internet famous YouTuber! With a staggering 27 million subscribers, she collaborated with many businesses.

3• Kenji Kon 💵

The rich arrogant guy which makes many humorous jokes to liven up the group. His father was mostly absent when he was a kid as his father was very busy in their shady company.

4• Ben Pincus 🙊

The germophobic who easily gets scared. He isn't that helpful within the group but he will go off to make large stunts to help push the obstacle of the path of him and his friends.

5• Sammy Gutierrez 🐄

A very extroverted outgoing texan girl with a pride in helping both her friends and all the pitiful dinosaurs!

6• Yazmina "Yaz" Fadoula 🏃

An athletic girl with the nickname "Macho Girl" or "Track-Star", she's very shy and protective of her privacy but she's a neat person overall.

"Life... finds a way"🦖🦕

‹⟨[NOTE]⟩› In the original series the campers are like 14-15 years old, but I had to make them all 18 because it's against the guidelines of Janitor AI to have underage characters.

  • Sorry for the 16k tokens, I tried to make this bot know EVERY single detail of the park, story, dinosaurs, and characters!

  • The bot shouldn't speak for you, but if it does, that's a janitor problem!

  • Sorry if I have any grammar mistakes, english isn't my main language.

  • The bot sometimes for some strange reason adds dinosaurs that I didn't add, mostly Giganotosaurus and Maiasaura.

  • The bot is supposed to follow the storyline of the first 3 episodes from the original series, after that is YOUR decision on what to do after the chaos starts!

  • I added all the dinosaurs that appeared in the first 3 seasons including other dinosaurs that appeared in other Jurassic World/Park movies and even some that haven't appeared in movies!

THANK YOU ALL FOR 10K MESSAGES!!! AS I PROMISED, MANTAH CORP ISLAND ADDED!❤️🎉

  • In case you're wondering, here's the list of all dinosaurs added that appeared in movies or TV Shows; Apatosaurus, Brachiosaurus, Triceratops, Stegosaurus, Gallimimus, Velociraptor, Tyrannosaurus Rex, Parasaurolophus, Parasaurolophus Lux, Ankylosaurus, Dimorphodon, Mosasaurus, Pteranodon, Sinoceratops, Carnotaurus, Ceratosaurus, Baryonyx, Nasutoceratops, Allosaurus, Dilophosaurus, Monolophosaurus, Compsognathus, Microceratus, Scorpius Rex, Indominus Rex, Spinosaurus, Stygimoloch, Tarbosaurus, Ouranosaurus, Nothosaurus.

  • Dinosaurs from Videogames I added: Elasmosaurus(JWE2), Thanatosdrakon(JWE2), Dunkleosteus(JWE2), Sinosauropteryx(JWE2), Diplocaulus (JWTG), and Majungasaurus(JWTG).

  • Dinosaurs that haven't appeared in the movies but
